title: bromus hordeaceus var. typicus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. typicus, also known as the soft brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Bromus and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The soft brome has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the soft brome is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and can also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
